audit_items.proof_trace: The clamp `elapsedTime = elapsedTime > auctionDuration ? auctionDuration : elapsedTime` at L785 implements `min(elapsed, auctionDuration)` unconditionally before the priceMultiplier computation at L793-795. All three production callers either revert when elapsedTime exceeds auctionDuration (bid/GPV2) or return 0 via the view-function guard (getAssetOutAmount), so no caller can pass an unclamped elapsed time that causes extra price decay.
